description: Lang-pack validation: `node scripts/generate-pseudo-locales.cjs && node scripts/validate-translations.cjs` passes for all 9 locales after namespace creation (covers key parity, missing/extra keys, interpolation variables, pseudo-locale patterns, Italian accents). Single check, run on every commit.
Unit: ReconciliationResolution renders stepper labels (Review Discrepancy / Approval / Confirmation) via t() in en
Unit: ReconciliationResolution renders resolution options (Recommended Fix / Custom Correction / No Action Required) via t()
Unit: ReconciliationResolution renders balance comparison labels (Expected Balance / Actual Balance / Difference) and four-eyes approval text via t()
Unit: ReconciliationResolution renders confirmation dialog text and error messages via t()
Unit: ReconciliationResolution pseudo-locale (xx) shows pseudo-text for all visible strings
Unit: DiscrepancyDetail renders status badges (Open/In Review/Resolved) and back nav via t()
Unit: DiscrepancyDetail renders transaction history table headers (Date/Type/Amount/Balance After/Description) via t()
Unit: DiscrepancyDetail renders credit tracking table headers and issue detail alerts via t()
Unit: DiscrepancyDetail resolution dialog renders translated labels and empty/error states via t()
Unit: DiscrepancyDetail pseudo-locale (xx) shows pseudo-text for all visible strings
Unit: UsageTracking renders table headers (Client/Service/Quantity/Usage Date/Contract Line/Actions) via t()
Unit: UsageTracking renders add/edit dialog labels and toast messages via t()
Unit: UsageTracking renders contract line selector guidance text via t()
Unit: LineItem renders service field labels (Service/Quantity/Rate/Description) and discount labels via t()
Unit: LineItem renders collapsed summary text (Taxable/Non-Taxable/Subtotal) and action buttons (Add/Remove/Restore) via t()
Unit: FixedContractLineServicesList renders table headers (Service Name/Category/Billing Method/Quantity/Default Rate/Actions) and billing method labels via t()
Unit: FixedContractLineServicesList renders add services section heading, empty states, and action menu items via t()
Unit: AccountingExportsTab renders card title, table headers, and action buttons via t()
Unit: AccountingExportsTab renders new export dialog labels and batch detail dialog labels via t()
Unit: AccountingExportsTab renders translated status labels for batch rows and detail dialog instead of raw backend codes
Unit: FixedContractLinePresetServicesList renders table headers and save/reset buttons via t()
Unit: FixedContractLinePresetServicesList renders unsaved changes warning and navigation warning dialog via t()
Unit: RecommendedFixPanel renders fix option headings and descriptions per issue type via t()
Unit: RecommendedFixPanel renders fix dialog titles, impact summary labels, and resolved state message via t()
Unit: Overview renders metric card titles (Active Contract Lines/Billing Clients/Monthly Revenue/etc.) via t()
Unit: Overview renders feature card titles and descriptions (Payment Processing/Billing Cycles/etc.) via t()
Unit: BillingDashboard renders page title 'Billing' and beta warning banner via t()
Unit: BillingDashboard pseudo-locale (xx) shows pseudo-text for page title and banner
Unit: EditContractLineServiceQuantityDialog renders dialog title with interpolated service name, quantity label, and validation messages via t()
Unit: EditContractLineServiceQuantityDialog renders save/cancel button labels via t()
Unit: billingTabsConfig tab labels are translatable and render correctly via t() in the consuming BillingDashboard component
Unit: all 16 tab labels render translated text in de locale
Unit: TemplateRenderer renders loading text, error prefix, and empty state via t()
Unit: PropertyEditor renders field labels (Content/Data Field/Width/Height/Font Size/Color) via t()
Unit: ConditionalRuleManager renders heading, action options, and button label via t()
Unit: ContractsHub renders 'Contracts' heading and sub-tab labels via t()
Unit: TemplateRendererCore user-visible strings ('N/A', 'Unknown value') are either translated or documented as non-UI output
Integration: /msp/billing loads in en with Overview tab showing translated metric titles and feature cards
Integration: /msp/billing loads in de with translated page title, beta banner, and tab labels
Integration: /msp/billing?tab=usage-tracking renders translated table headers and filter labels in de
Integration: /msp/billing?tab=accounting-exports renders translated exports card and dialog in de
Integration: xx pseudo-locale smoke test across /msp/billing overview and usage-tracking tabs renders pseudo-text everywhere with no bare English leakage
Regression: existing billing unit/integration tests pass after i18n wiring
Manual: visual diff on /msp/billing in en between main and PR branch -- no layout shifts from translated strings
Manual: visual diff on /msp/billing in de -- long German strings do not break button/column widths
